2026 Summer Academy for the Deaf
& Hard of Hearing Schedule

Table of Contents

  • Monday June 22nd
  • Tuesday June 23rd
  • Wednesday June 24th
  • Thursday June 25th
  • Friday June 26th

  • Sunday June 28th
  • Monday June 29th

Monday June 22nd

DHH Arrival Day
Time Activity
2:30 - 3:15 PM

Student Arrival / Drop off Student's Belongings at Dorm

  • Parents should go to "Student Lot 82"
  • RAs will assist to unload student's belongings into bins.
  • Student's belongings will be secured and locked in their dorm room until they arrive.

Medications should remain in the vehicle with parents and students

2:30 - 3:30 PM

RN Medication Check In/Drop Off

Business Bldg. 215
BrightStar Staff
2:30 PM - 3:45 PM

DHH Students Check-In

  • Greeting and Mingling
  • Comm Access Check In

Business Bldg. Atrium
Heather Snyder, Christina Derhammer, Nick Mastromatteo
3:15 PM

Parents & Students arrive no later than 3:15 PM
3:30 PM

Parents Depart

3:45 PM – 4:30 PM

Student Welcome Meeting / Snacks and Drinks

217 Business Bldg.

  • Student rules and guidelines
  • Student introductions/Ice Breakers
  • Communication rules – intro to communication at Summer Academy
  • Schedule for the rest of the evening

Heather Snyder, Christina Derhammer
4:30 PM – 5:30 PM

Unpack and Get Settled in Dorm

Stuart Hall

Heather Snyder, Christina Derhammer and Nick Mastromatteo
5:45 PM – 6:45 PM

Dinner

Findlay Commons
7:00 PM – 9:00 PM

Evening Activity: Knex Towers Team Building

217 Business Bldg.
9:00 PM – 10:30 PM

Showers and Chill time

Stuart Hall
10:30 PM

Lights Out
